# Plumb Me — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Plumb Me is a local plumbing business based in New York, serving the surrounding community with plumbing solutions. The brand name has a playful, memorable twist that gives it a friendly and approachable personality, setting it apart from more generic plumbing companies.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://plumb-me-58c0d304.zappy5.app
Plumb Me delivers expert residential plumbing services in New York with a smile. From leaks to clogs, our local pros handle it all. Schedule your service today!

### Services
https://plumb-me-58c0d304.zappy5.app/services
Explore Plumb Me&#39;s full range of home services: plumbing, heating, air &amp; electrical solutions. Quality workmanship and upfront pricing. See how we can help!

### About
https://plumb-me-58c0d304.zappy5.app/about
Discover the Plumb Me difference: a local New York team built on trust, skill, and a playful spirit. Learn why neighbors choose us for all their plumbing needs.

### Contact
https://plumb-me-58c0d304.zappy5.app/contact
Ready for reliable service? Contact Plumb Me for action plumbing, heating and air in New York. Get your free estimate and experience the friendliest service in town!

### Thank You | Plumb Me

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://plumb-me-58c0d304.zappy5.app/contact
- Endpoint: https://plumb-me-58c0d304.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text)
  - `email` (email)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Plumb Me
Plumb Me is a local plumbing business based in New York, serving the surrounding community with plumbing solutions. The brand name has a playful, memorable twist that gives it a friendly and approachable personality, setting it apart from more generic plumbing companies.

## Target Audience
- local residents and businesses in New York
- Local Homeowners in NY
- Property Management Firms
- New Homebuyers in NY

## Industry
Home Services / Plumbing
